articles.title: The Day Poverty Dies (and Why I’m Weirdly Emotional About It)
articles.description: “Optimus will eliminate poverty and provide universal high income for all.” Elon Musk Austin, Texas – I’ve listened to Elon Musk talk about the future more times than I can count, but something hit different in the last couple of weeks. First on November 19 in Washington DC with Jensen Huang, then again on November […]
articles.author: Gail Alfar

articles.title: Tesla sells out Model Y production in China for 2025 as delivery estimates extend into next year
articles.description:
Tesla’s Model Y order books in China have filled up for 2025. As of this week, all four Model Y trims built at Giga Shanghai are officially sold out for the rest of the year, […]

The post Tesla sells out Model Y production in China for 2025 as delivery estimates extend into next year appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Darryn John

articles.title: Tesla’s European Sales Slide in November While Norway Smashes All-Time Record
articles.description:
Tesla’s November performance in Europe painted a challenging picture, with registrations across major markets continuing to decline. But while much of the continent saw slowing momentum, Norway delivered a new all-time annual sales record. According […]

The post Tesla’s European Sales Slide in November While Norway Smashes All-Time Record appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Matt Wilson

articles.title: Bollinger Motors Shuts Down After 10 Turbulent Years in the EV Market
articles.description:
Bollinger Motors, once touted as one of Michigan’s most promising EV startups, has officially shut down after years of financial setbacks, lawsuits, and missed payroll. Internal emails obtained by the Detroit Free Press confirm the […]

The post Bollinger Motors Shuts Down After 10 Turbulent Years in the EV Market appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Matt Wilson

articles.title: Japan’s Newest Tesla Megapack Project Goes Live in Hokkaido
articles.description:
Japan has flipped the switch on another major Tesla Megapack installation, with Manoa Energy confirming this week that the Helios 50MW Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in Sapporo City, Hokkaido is now officially online. Helios […]

The post Japan’s Newest Tesla Megapack Project Goes Live in Hokkaido appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Matt Wilson

articles.title: Tesla Snags Top Apple AI Engineer For Optimus Team
articles.description:
Tesla’s push to accelerate development of Optimus continues to attract high-profile talent from across the tech world. The latest notable addition is Yilun Chen, who revealed this week that he has left Apple after nearly […]

The post Tesla Snags Top Apple AI Engineer For Optimus Team appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Matt Wilson

articles.title: Tesla Secures Approval for FSD Testing in Spain
articles.description:
Spain has introduced a comprehensive national framework for autonomous vehicle testing, providing Tesla with a clear regulatory path to conduct advanced testing on public roads. The new Automated Vehicle Testing Authorization Framework (ES-AV), formalizes how […]

The post Tesla Secures Approval for FSD Testing in Spain appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Matt Wilson

articles.title: Tesla Hikes Model 3/Y Windshield Protection Plan Prices
articles.description:
Tesla is notifying U.S. owners that the price of its Windshield Protection Plan for the Model 3 and Model Y is increasing next year. Longtime Tesla watcher Sawyer Merritt (@SawyerMerritt) first spotted the change, sharing a screenshot of Tesla’s official email to customers. In the message, Tesla writes: “We want to inform you of an […]

The post Tesla Hikes Model 3/Y Windshield Protection Plan Prices appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Elon Musk Talks Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI ‘Convergence’ [VIDEO]
articles.description:
Elon Musk recently sat down with entrepreneur and investor Nikhil Kamath for the latest episode of the People by WTF podcast, recorded at Tesla’s headquarters in Texas. The wide-ranging, nearly two-hour conversation touched on everything from consciousness and parenting to the future of AI and global politics, but some of the most notable comments came […]

The post Elon Musk Talks Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI ‘Convergence’ [VIDEO] appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla Model Y Orders in China Slip Into 2026
articles.description:
Tesla has officially sold out all remaining 2025 production slots for the Model Y in China, with new orders for all four trims now showing estimated delivery dates between January and February 2026. The update comes from Tesla’s online configurator, which is now directing customers to purchase vehicles currently in stock if they want guaranteed […]

The post Tesla Model Y Orders in China Slip Into 2026 appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla Megapacks Power New $50 Million Grid Battery in Japan
articles.description:
A major Tesla-powered energy storage project has officially gone live in northern Japan, marking one of the country’s most significant grid battery deployments to date. Manoa Energy has begun commercial operations of its new 50 MW/104 MWh “Helios” Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in Sapporo City, Hokkaido — a project equipped with Tesla’s flagship Megapack […]

The post Tesla Megapacks Power New $50 Million Grid Battery in Japan appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla Faces Europe Slump Despite Norway Sales Record
articles.description:
Tesla’s sales story in Europe took on a split personality in November, with steep declines across several major markets contrasted sharply by unprecedented demand in Norway. According to new registration data reported by Reuters, Tesla saw year-over-year drops of more than 50% in France and Sweden, as well as double-digit declines in Denmark, the Netherlands, […]

The post Tesla Faces Europe Slump Despite Norway Sales Record appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla bear gets blunt with beliefs over company valuation
articles.description:
Tesla bear Michael Burry got blunt with his beliefs over the company’s valuation, which he called “ridiculously overvalued” in a newsletter to subscribers this past weekend. “Tesla’s market capitalization is ridiculously overvalued today and has been for a good long time,” Burry, who was the inspiration for the movie The Big Short, and was portrayed by Christian […]

The post Tesla bear gets blunt with beliefs over company valuation appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Joey Klender

articles.title: Tesla is making a change to its exterior cameras with a potential upgrade
articles.description:
Tesla appears to be making a change to its exterior side repeater cameras, which are used for the company’s Full Self-Driving suite, and other features, like Sentry Mode. The change appears to be a potential upgrade in preparation for the AI5 suite, which CEO Elon Musk said will be present on a handful of vehicles […]

The post Tesla is making a change to its exterior cameras with a potential upgrade appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Joey Klender

articles.title: Tesla Model Y Standard Full Review: Is it worth the lower price?
articles.description:
Tesla launched the Model Y Standard as an attempt to offer affordable electric vehicles to consumers now that the $7,500 EV tax credit is gone. We were able to spend four days with the car, and it was more than enough time to determine whether or not the car was worth the $9,000 discount compared […]

The post Tesla Model Y Standard Full Review: Is it worth the lower price? appeared first on TESLARATI.
articles.author: Joey Klender
